top_signals.title: Hong Kong Targets July Launch for Gold-Clearing System
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong plans to launch a new gold-clearing system by July, advancing the city’s ambitions to become a global hub for bullion trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: China Bonds Buck Global Rout With Yields Hitting Nine-Month Low
top_signals.summary: China’s bonds are diverging further from peers as a fragile economic recovery and ample market liquidity keep local yields anchored despite a global debt selloff.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
